channel.title: _metapages on James Akl
channel.description: Recent content in _metapages on James Akl

item.title: Posts
item.description: Articles Matrix Calculus Notation · Discussing the ‘matrix derivative’ in formal settings. QP and Least Squares · Analyzing the relationship between QP and least squares. Reading Spatial Transforms · Ways to interpret homogeneous (rigid-body) transform. A Tour of Robot Mechanics · Broad glide over robot kinematics and dynamics. Defining a Robot · Attempt to answer “What is a robot?” in a prescriptive manner. Projects Convex Analysis & Optimization: Select Works · Collection of interesting problems with my proofs and solutions.

item.title: Research
item.description: Some of my research contributions are disclosed below. Publications All preprint material is subject to the corresponding publisher's copyright. [PDF] Cut Sequencing Algorithm for Safely Disassembling Large Structures, 2023 IEEE Conference on Decision and Control (CDC). James Akl; Sumanth Pericherla; Berk Calli. [PDF] Vision-Based Oxy-Fuel Torch Control for Robotic Metal Cutting, 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS).

item.title: Resume
item.description: My professional and educational backgrounds are summarized below. View my resume For other information, please request directly at james-akl@outlook.com.
